calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-28-2025 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Feb-10-2025 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-18-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Maureen McFadden appeared by zoom for Mary Towner (proposed executor).

Mrs. McFadden stated that there are no objections to the will and that the decedent was in possession of the original will. The court finds that Probate Code 6124 does not apply. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Lost Will and for Letters Testamentary. The lost will dated July 16, 2013 is admitted to probate. Mary Towner is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Michael Kasolas is appointed probate referee. Status on close of estate is set for April 28, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported.
